notes: Heat from Gmail task chains is cross-validated against the captured Gate-1 13-tool launch set (Gate 0 ten tools plus get_message / apply_sensitive_*). Launch MCP tools and in-scope REST rows are semantic over one deterministic domain; users.watch, users.stop, and resumable uploads remain named cold 501/unsupported gaps.

evidenceCodes.TC:inbox-triage: Search/read threads and messages for agent email triage
evidenceCodes.TC:compose-send: Send messages / send drafts as mailbox-state transitions (no external SMTP)
evidenceCodes.TC:label-triage: Apply/remove labels on messages and threads
evidenceCodes.TC:sync-history: Mailbox history sync for incremental agents
evidenceCodes.TC:identity-read: Send-as and forwarding address reads for From validation context
evidenceCodes.TC:mailbox-seed: Import path for deterministic mailbox seeding

doc_drift.detail: Gate 1 promotes get_message, apply_sensitive_thread_label, and apply_sensitive_message_label into the OSS launch set so tools/list matches the live 13-tool Developer Preview capture.
Public HTML docs previously showed list_drafts Read Only Hint false; live capture annotations.readOnlyHint=true. Live capture is the listing oracle.
